arts.ttl: Latest transfer news and rumours today: Taiwo Awoniyi to West Ham, Max Aarons to Valencia, Calvin Ramsay leaves Liverpool on loan
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Taiwo Awoniyi to West Ham, Max Aarons to Valencia and Calvin Ramsay to Kilmarnock.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca reveals how Jadon Sancho has ‘surprised’ him this season
arts.sum: Sancho is restoring his reputation under Maresca after a difficult few years at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Premier League rivals set for imminent points deduction bombshell amid PSR concerns
arts.sum: The Premier League is set to issue complaints on Tuesday to any clubs found in breach of its profitability and sustainability rules (PSR), which could potentially lead to points deductions, with Chelsea confident of their adherence to the rules. They were slapped with a PSR breach concerning their 2022-23 accounts last March, but an appeal in September determined by an independent commission that the Premier League had no jurisdiction over the club, as they had been relegated to the EFL by the time the 2022-23 accounting period concluded.

arts.ttl: Chelsea hold transfer 'talks' over signing as Christopher Nkunku swap deal 'offered'
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly held talks with Bayern Munich over a potential January transfer for winger Mathys Tel, as Enzo Maresca looks to add to his squad before the end of the month. Like Tel at Bayern, Nkunku has struggled for regular game time at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make Renato Veiga transfer decision as Borussia Dortmund links and £20m stance explained
arts.sum: Chelsea will allow young star Renato Veiga to leave the club in the January transfer window, football.london understands, but only on a permanent deal. football.london understands that Chelsea are open to Veiga leaving the club this month, but not on a loan deal following his arrival in the summer for around €14million (£11.8million).

arts.ttl: Felix, Madueke and Acheampong in Chelsea XI Maresca must pick vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Bobby's line-up : Sanchez; Gusto, Acheampong, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Fernandez; Madueke, Palmer, Felix; Jackson. Chelsea face Bournemouth on Tuesday evening as the Blues look to end their poor recent form in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's baffling £42m transfer decisions raise questions amid January moves - Joe Doyle
arts.sum: football.london understands Renato Veiga will be allowed to leave the club this month, while Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall is strongly linked with an exit just six months after both arrived on permanent deals worth a combined £42million. It's fair to say that Veiga was viewed as a young star with potential to improve in the future, but has decided he wants to leave the club, with the Blues willing to allow a permanent exit rather than sanction a loan move for the 21-year-old.

arts.ttl: Chelsea enquire about Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel
arts.sum: Chelsea FC have enquired over a potential deal to sign Bayern Munich striker Mathys Tel (19), according to Fabrizio Romano. It has been reported that the French forward could be…

arts.ttl: Chelsea make enquiry for teenage Bayern winger Tel
arts.sum: Bayern Munich's 19-year-old winger Mathys Tel is a target for the Blues during the January transfer window with the German side interested in Chelsea forward Christopher Nkunku.

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku wants to join Bayern as Chelsea consider swap deal for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: According to a report from Florian Plettenberg, Christopher Nkunku (27) wants to join Bayern Munich from Chelsea FC. The two clubs may be interested in doing a swap deal with…
